MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES , NOTICE OF NON-APPEARANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA HEARING SET FOR DEC-28-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

PROOF OF SERVICE OF CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; NOTICE OF PETITION; NOTICE OF NON-APPEARANCE; P&A; JUDGMENT; PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA SERVED OCT-20-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT GOODING, DIANE N

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A.'S (AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE) MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR#:8620
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-28-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE BANK USA N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GOODING, DIANE N $14,368.79 PRINCIPAL, $546.62 INTEREST, $405.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,320.41, SEE SCANNED DOC
